title: Auto Leveling Naming
description: Adds the mob level to his name
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This mod is intended to be used alongside [Auto Levelling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/auto-leveling)


A simple mod that adds the Auto Leveling mob level to it's name. This makes it so health bar mods work with Auto Leveling.

You can use the gamerule **doLevelsOnlyAffectMonsters** to choose if all mobs show thier level or if only monsters do.

For this mod to work you need to disable the Auto Leveling level display on it's config.

Health bar mods that work: 

[YDM's MobHealthBar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ydms-mobhealthbar-mod)

 

If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
